message:
chore(release): bump version to 0.2.0

Increment version for new release containing:

Features:
- feat(shell): Add 6 Oh-My-Zsh plugins (python, pip, tmux, tmuxinator,
  systemd, rsync) to default configuration
- feat(analytics): Comprehensive GA4 acquisition tracking and diagnostics

Fixes:
- fix(agents): Handle jq alternative operator treating false as falsy
- fix(agents): Correct heredoc and file ownership bugs in Gemini config
- fix(agents): Configure Gemini CLI for tmux compatibility
- fix(analytics): Correct script reference in GA4 diagnostic recommendations
- fix(e2e): Resolve strict mode and flaky navigation test failures
- fix(ci): Resolve YAML lint, shellcheck, and SSH key TTY issues

Documentation:
- Extensive README expansion (~1,000+ lines) covering:
  - Tmux configuration deep dive
  - Wizard state management (TanStack Query)
  - Generated manifest index system
  - Jargon component architecture
  - Shell keybindings reference
  - Learning Hub and lessons
  - CI/CD automation details
  - Provider comparison guides
  - Validation error codes
  - Test harness documentation

Maintenance:
- refactor(cass): Remove obsolete robot wrapper code
- Multiple checksum auto-updates for upstream installers

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 ├── README.md                     # This file
